overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character in black-and-white Kurosawa mode. The character walks along a coastal cliff path, pauses at the edge to look down at the ocean, then continues through a grassy forest trail with wind-swept vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff approach path with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along a dirt path toward a cliff edge, passing through tall grass and approaching stone ruins with smoke

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass
tall green grass lining both sides of the path
tall green grass lining both sides of the path
ancient stone structure with wooden elements and smoke rising
dark smoke rising into the sky from behind the ruins

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall grass, approaching ancient stone ruins with smoke visible in the distance. The path winds between grassy hills and rocky outcrops under an overcast sky.

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the cliff edge
camera tilts down to look at the ocean waves crashing against rocks below
character turns away from the cliff edge to face the path back

agents.ego_description: character stands at the cliff edge looking down at the ocean waves crashing against the rocks below, then turns to survey the surrounding cliff face

entered.detail: grassy moss-covered edge of the cliff
steep gray rock cliff face dropping to the water
dark ocean water with white wave crests below
isolated rock formation standing in the water

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the edge of a high cliff overlooking the ocean, with waves crashing against the rocks and a solitary sea stack below. The camera pans down to show the drop before the character turns to face the cliff face with its wooden structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wind-swept grass and trees

events.description: character walks away from the cliff edge into a forested area with tall grass and trees
wind blows through the grass and trees, scattering leaves in the air

agents.ego_description: character walks along a winding dirt path through dense forest with tall grass swaying in the wind, heading toward a distant structure visible through the trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
tall deciduous trees with green foliage
tall deciduous trees and bamboo groves
massive white boulders among the trees
traditional building visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the cliff along a forest path surrounded by dense tall grass and trees swaying in the wind. The path winds between large rock formations toward a distant traditional building visible through the foliage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate highland path toward a dramatic coastal precipice and finally into a wind-swept forest. It begins with the samurai walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by tall grass and rocky outcrops, moving toward ancient stone ruins under an overcast sky. As the path reaches the coast, the camera pans down from the character's position at the cliff's edge to reveal crashing waves and a solitary sea stack below before turning back toward the wooden structures of the cliff face. The scene then shifts as the character moves away from the overlook, entering a dense forest where trees and tall grass sway violently in the wind. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail between large rock formations, pushing through the foliage toward a distant traditional building.
